title: Deflection emitter
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''deflection emitter''' was a specialized [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] blade emitter designed especially for generating a blade well-suited for deflecting incoming blaster bolts. As a result, such an emitter was ideal for practitioners of [[Form III/Legends|Form III]] [[Lightsaber combat/Legends|lightsaber combat]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
